rationale: Elec. Code §254.154 governs campaign finance reporting deadlines for general-purpose committees. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: In addition to other required reports, for each election in which a general-purpose committee is involved, the committee's campaign treasurer shall file two reports.
_note: No conflict. The cited election code provision addresses campaign treasurer reporting schedules and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b).
